details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements met: (1) top_a parameter added to SamplingParams as float with default 0.0 and validation for [0.0, 1.0] range; (2) Filtering logic correctly implemented computing max probability, masking tokens below top_a * max_prob, and setting to -inf for implicit renormalization; (3) top_a properly threaded through SamplingTensors, SamplingMetadata, input batches (GPU/TPU), and both main and v1 sampler implementations; (4) Comprehensive documentation in docstrings explaining the algorithm and parameter; (5) Syntactically valid Python following vLLM conventions, matching patterns of similar sampling methods (min_p, top_k, top_p). The do_top_a conditional flags are properly implemented and used. Coverage includes all necessary code paths: model executor sampler, v1 sampler, TPU sampler, and worker input batches.
